raw_response: {"response":"Do not trust the candidate. It preserves the three outcome labels, but it detaches the refund actions from the required policy evidence and decision reason. The proposed surface only has a case list and decision footer, so approval can happen without the visible evidence/rationale constraint from the source brief.","next_action":"Reject and repair the workflow around evidence-backed decisioning: require a selected case evidence view, visible policy evidence, visible decision reason, and outcome controls that remain tied to those materials before approval is submitted.","questions":[],"handoff":"Support lead or workflow designer must revise the approval console because the fixture lacks visible policy evidence and rationale before approval; verify the repaired flow keeps evidence, reason, and chosen outcome visible together before submission.","rationale":"The source request's critical dependency is not just choosing one of three outcomes; it is making a high-value refund decision while policy evidence and the reason remain visible before approval. The candidate compresses the activity into queue selection plus footer actions, omits evidence and rationale sections, and gives a generic close-case handoff, so it should not be trusted."}

parsed.response: Do not trust the candidate. It preserves the three outcome labels, but it detaches the refund actions from the required policy evidence and decision reason. The proposed surface only has a case list and decision footer, so approval can happen without the visible evidence/rationale constraint from the source brief.
parsed.next_action: Reject and repair the workflow around evidence-backed decisioning: require a selected case evidence view, visible policy evidence, visible decision reason, and outcome controls that remain tied to those materials before approval is submitted.
parsed.handoff: Support lead or workflow designer must revise the approval console because the fixture lacks visible policy evidence and rationale before approval; verify the repaired flow keeps evidence, reason, and chosen outcome visible together before submission.
parsed.rationale: The source request's critical dependency is not just choosing one of three outcomes; it is making a high-value refund decision while policy evidence and the reason remain visible before approval. The candidate compresses the activity into queue selection plus footer actions, omits evidence and rationale sections, and gives a generic close-case handoff, so it should not be trusted.

execution.command_display: codex exec --model gpt-5.5 -c model_reasoning_effort="xhigh" --sandbox read-only --skip-git-repo-check --ephemeral --color never --output-schema <schema> --output-last-message <output> -
